title: Quit Game Confirm
description: Tired of closing your game by accident? Then you should use Quit Game Confirm!
body:
# **Quit Game Confirm:**
**Quit Game Confirm** is a mod that adds a menu before closing the game, to make accidents more difficult.

## Information:
- **Quit Game Confirm** is compatible with **[**Enhanced Loading Screens (1.4+)**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-loading-screens).**
 
- You can press **ESC** to close the menu instead of clicking the Cancel button.

- Feel free to use this mod in modpacks or wherever you want!

## Quit Menu:
![Quit Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6e3329327a9391d1f3f52322691afbce4805c18.jpeg)

**Resource pack: [**Colourful containers Dark Mode GUI**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui).**

Not much to say, i hope you like this mod.

**Well, if you want to leave me a tip, https://ko-fi.com/mateusmg2010**

**Thanks for downloading :)**
